ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on **Tuesday, 24 April 2026 from 01:00 AM to 04:00 AM (UTC)**. During this window the VPN service will be unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly and avoid accessing the VPN during the maintenance period.

**What you need to do:**
1. Log out of the VPN before 12:55 AM UTC.
2. Verify that all critical applications are running on local or alternative secure connections.
3. After 04:00 AM UTC, reconnect to the VPN and ensure you can reach the internal resources.

If you encounter any issues or have questions, contact the IT Help Desk at ithelp@company.com or call 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks and Norton have generated Invoice #987654 for your account. The total amount of **$1,245.00** is due by **30 April 2026**. Failure to pay by the due date will result in an automatic suspension of your QuickBooks and Norton services.

To review your invoice and complete payment securely, please click the link below:

<URL>

For any questions regarding this invoice, contact our billing department at billing@quickbooks.com or call 800‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Team
